RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS ROBYN REYNOLDS and IAN REYNOLDS Motion Of Plaintiffs To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant Cory Lau And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Cory Lau And His Attorneys Of Record Greg De La Pena And Anderson Franco- The motion to compel deposition is GRANTED. Defendant Cory Lau is ordered to appear at deposition with documents. Counsel for the parties are ordered to meet and confer to set a date for the deposition to take place on or before May 30, 2016.
